markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on scaling Lovable template production.](https://fathom.video/share/X_Fg1sxTJw5B7YV98ePEkEJeCNiee8Vf?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Strong ROI justifies scaling:** December's 150 signups (from templates/guides) generated \~$37.5k in value (at Lovable's $250 LTV), exceeding our \~$25k contract.](https://fathom.video/share/X_Fg1sxTJw5B7YV98ePEkEJeCNiee8Vf?tab=summary&timestamp=605.0)
  - [**Immediate ramp-up approved:** We will hire 1–2 new contractors to double website template production to 10/week, leveraging the current successful strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/X_Fg1sxTJw5B7YV98ePEkEJeCNiee8Vf?tab=summary&timestamp=1012.0)
  - [**New "Tools" template workflow is the next priority:** Georgemaine will research the Lovable platform to define the process for building more complex templates, which Nicolas will then automate.](https://fathom.video/share/X_Fg1sxTJw5B7YV98ePEkEJeCNiee8Vf?tab=summary&timestamp=411.0)
  - [**Critical conversion bug identified:** Logged-out users cannot "remix" templates, causing significant lost signups. Megan will escalate this to Lovable for an immediate fix.](https://fathom.video/share/X_Fg1sxTJw5B7YV98ePEkEJeCNiee8Vf?tab=summary&timestamp=684.0)

## Topics

### Performance & Opportunity

  - [December performance validates scaling:](https://fathom.video/share/X_Fg1sxTJw5B7YV98ePEkEJeCNiee8Vf?tab=summary&timestamp=605.0)
      - [**Impressions:** 1.8M](https://fathom.video/share/X_Fg1sxTJw5B7YV98ePEkEJeCNiee8Vf?tab=summary&timestamp=1432.0)
      - [**Signups:** 150](https://fathom.video/share/X_Fg1sxTJw5B7YV98ePEkEJeCNiee8Vf?tab=summary&timestamp=623.0)
      - [**Value Generated:** \~$37.5k (at Lovable's $250 LTV)](https://fathom.video/share/X_Fg1sxTJw5B7YV98ePEkEJeCNiee8Vf?tab=summary&timestamp=623.0)
  - [The client is highly engaged and eager to expand, creating a clear opportunity to increase production and contract value.](https://fathom.video/share/X_Fg1sxTJw5B7YV98ePEkEJeCNiee8Vf?tab=summary&timestamp=605.0)

### Website Template Production

  - [**Current Bottleneck:** Georgemaine's review time (45–60 min/template) is the primary constraint on scaling.](https://fathom.video/share/X_Fg1sxTJw5B7YV98ePEkEJeCNiee8Vf?tab=summary&timestamp=231.0)
  - [**Contractor Feedback:** The current contractor, Bruno, is consistent but needs design guidance to move beyond a minimalist style.](https://fathom.video/share/X_Fg1sxTJw5B7YV98ePEkEJeCNiee8Vf?tab=summary&timestamp=296.0)
  - [**Decision:** Hire 1–2 new contractors to double production to 10 website templates/week.](https://fathom.video/share/X_Fg1sxTJw5B7YV98ePEkEJeCNiee8Vf?tab=summary&timestamp=1012.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This leverages a proven strategy for immediate impact while the "Tools" workflow is developed.](https://fathom.video/share/X_Fg1sxTJw5B7YV98ePEkEJeCNiee8Vf?tab=summary&timestamp=1012.0)
      - [**Contingency:** Georgemaine will create 5 templates next week if new hires are not ready.](https://fathom.video/share/X_Fg1sxTJw5B7YV98ePEkEJeCNiee8Vf?tab=summary&timestamp=1184.0)

### "Tools" Template Workflow

  - [**Goal:** Create a repeatable workflow for building more complex templates (e.g., PDF generators, calculators).](https://fathom.video/share/X_Fg1sxTJw5B7YV98ePEkEJeCNiee8Vf?tab=summary&timestamp=146.0)
  - [**Status:** The core technology is functional, but a defined, automatable workflow is still needed.](https://fathom.video/share/X_Fg1sxTJw5B7YV98ePEkEJeCNiee8Vf?tab=summary&timestamp=347.0)
  - [**Research Plan:** Georgemaine will test the Lovable platform to understand its capabilities and limitations.](https://fathom.video/share/X_Fg1sxTJw5B7YV98ePEkEJeCNiee8Vf?tab=summary&timestamp=411.0)
      - [**Objective:** Identify the specific steps and prompts required to build a tool, which will inform the automation design.](https://fathom.video/share/X_Fg1sxTJw5B7YV98ePEkEJeCNiee8Vf?tab=summary&timestamp=470.0)
      - [**Output:** A detailed research report for Nicolas.](https://fathom.video/share/X_Fg1sxTJw5B7YV98ePEkEJeCNiee8Vf?tab=summary&timestamp=586.0)

### Technical & Product Development

  - [**"Remix" Bug:** Logged-out users cannot remix templates → they are redirected to the homepage, causing lost conversions.](https://fathom.video/share/X_Fg1sxTJw5B7YV98ePEkEJeCNiee8Vf?tab=summary&timestamp=684.0)
      - [**Action:** Megan will escalate this to Lovable for an immediate fix.](https://fathom.video/share/X_Fg1sxTJw5B7YV98ePEkEJeCNiee8Vf?tab=summary&timestamp=791.0)
  - [**Automated Publishing:** Nicolas will create a PR to automate the guide publishing process, which Lovable has not yet implemented.](https://fathom.video/share/X_Fg1sxTJw5B7YV98ePEkEJeCNiee8Vf?tab=summary&timestamp=1328.0)
  - [**New Template Page Design:** Georgemaine's new design for Sebastian is ready for review.](https://fathom.video/share/X_Fg1sxTJw5B7YV98ePEkEJeCNiee8Vf?tab=summary&timestamp=1580.0)
      - [**Blocker:** The staging site is down.](https://fathom.video/share/X_Fg1sxTJw5B7YV98ePEkEJeCNiee8Vf?tab=summary&timestamp=1608.0)
      - [**Dependency:** The interactive demo requires access to Lovable's internal LLM to generate functionality prompts.](https://fathom.video/share/X_Fg1sxTJw5B7YV98ePEkEJeCNiee8Vf?tab=summary&timestamp=1645.0)
  - [**Future Idea: Component Library:** George proposed a component library (e.g., Framer-style sections) to make building more visual and intuitive, reducing reliance on text prompts.](https://fathom.video/share/X_Fg1sxTJw5B7YV98ePEkEJeCNiee8Vf?tab=summary&timestamp=1734.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Megan:**](https://fathom.video/share/X_Fg1sxTJw5B7YV98ePEkEJeCNiee8Vf?tab=summary&timestamp=2066.0)
      - [Escalate the "remix" bug to Lovable.](https://fathom.video/share/X_Fg1sxTJw5B7YV98ePEkEJeCNiee8Vf?tab=summary&timestamp=791.0)
      - [Initiate a "Deals Desk" thread to price the template production ramp-up.](https://fathom.video/share/X_Fg1sxTJw5B7YV98ePEkEJeCNiee8Vf?tab=summary&timestamp=1539.0)
  - [**George:**](https://fathom.video/share/X_Fg1sxTJw5B7YV98ePEkEJeCNiee8Vf?tab=summary&timestamp=1114.0)
      - [Reactivate the contractor sourcing chat with Marilia.](https://fathom.video/share/X_Fg1sxTJw5B7YV98ePEkEJeCNiee8Vf?tab=summary&timestamp=1114.0)
      - [Schedule a review of the new template page design with Sebastian once the staging site is live.](https://fathom.video/share/X_Fg1sxTJw5B7YV98ePEkEJeCNiee8Vf?tab=summary&timestamp=2047.0)
  - [**Georgemaine:**](https://fathom.video/share/X_Fg1sxTJw5B7YV98ePEkEJeCNiee8Vf?tab=summary&timestamp=1114.0)
      - [Provide feedback to Marilia on sourcing criteria for new contractors.](https://fathom.video/share/X_Fg1sxTJw5B7YV98ePEkEJeCNiee8Vf?tab=summary&timestamp=1114.0)
      - [Research the Lovable platform to define the "Tools" workflow and deliver a report to Nicolas.](https://fathom.video/share/X_Fg1sxTJw5B7YV98ePEkEJeCNiee8Vf?tab=summary&timestamp=411.0)
      - [Fix the staging site for the new template page design.](https://fathom.video/share/X_Fg1sxTJw5B7YV98ePEkEJeCNiee8Vf?tab=summary&timestamp=1608.0)
  - [**Nicolas:**](https://fathom.video/share/X_Fg1sxTJw5B7YV98ePEkEJeCNiee8Vf?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)
      - [Create a PR to automate the guide publishing workflow.](https://fathom.video/share/X_Fg1sxTJw5B7YV98ePEkEJeCNiee8Vf?tab=summary&timestamp=1328.0)
      - [Prepare to publish 2 guides/day this week.](https://fathom.video/share/X_Fg1sxTJw5B7YV98ePEkEJeCNiee8Vf?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)
